hero.statement: Every perfect prison begins with a perfect equation.
hero.description: MATHBHOOT needs brilliant minds. Create traps. Build characters. Design rules. Help shape a world where mathematics is power, and curiosity changes every outcome.
hero.imageAlt: A masked mathematical antagonist holding a glowing geometric construct
hero.orderText: The protagonist must be challenged. Not by force, but by numbers. Lock every path in calculations. Trap every turn in logic. Leave one brilliant way through.

missions.title: Create a Mathematical Trap
missions.description: Design a trap that uses mathematics to confuse, challenge, and test the protagonist.

missions.title: Build an NPC
missions.description: Create students, teachers, ghosts, guides, or ancient mathematicians who exist in MathVilla.

missions.title: Design an Ancient Artifact
missions.description: Invent a powerful mathematical artifact that can help or challenge the protagonist.

missions.title: Create a Room of MathVilla
missions.description: Design a mysterious room filled with puzzles, clues, rules, and experiential dangers.

missions.title: Design a New Rule
missions.description: Create a mathematical law that controls part of the world of MathVilla.

application.heading: Become Part of the Shadow Network
application.description: Fill the dossier below and prepare your first contribution to the Antagonist Program.

fields.label: Choose a unique username
fields.title: Use 3–30 letters, numbers, or underscores only.

fields.label: Idea description
fields.placeholder: Describe the idea, how the player experiences it, the mathematics involved, and the intended outcome.

application.consentLabel: I confirm this is my original idea and agree that MATHBHOOT may store my email and submission for review.
application.draftNotice: Your first confirmation sends an email verification link. The submission reaches MATHBHOOT only after you verify that email and confirm again.
